description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two jobs. The test_node job runs in the default test stage using the node:alpine Docker image and executes the exact commands: node --version, npm --version, npm install, and npm test. The test_ubuntu job also runs in the default test stage using the ubuntu Docker image and executes: apt-get update, apt-get install curl -qq, curl -sL https://deb.nodesource.com/setup_8.x | bash -, apt-get install nodejs -qq, node --version, npm --version, npm install, and npm test. Neither job defines caches, artifacts, or special rules.
